transcript: Oh, hi, this is Stu. I got your number from your mother, actually. How’re ya doin’?
I’m good! Uh… I… had a project I just thought you’d be good for and I wanted to give ya a call. I actually have a bunch of cards… that I need shuffled.

Yeah. Some neighborhood kids got into my… belongings. They shuffled together— I got something in the neighborhood of, uh… I think about seventeen thousand cards. There’s playing cards and Garbage Pail cards. They’re all mixed up. And I just wanted to have them separated out. And if you could somehow get in, um… help me out with it, that’d be— that would be really great and helpful for me. I could… certainly pay you for your time.—
…I mean, that would be no problem at all. I got nothing— nothing against doing something like that. [mutters]—
I— It— It sounds like a— a lotta cards.
Oh, sure, big time! A lotta cards. [mutters]—
Are you—? Are you tryin’ to… organize them or just…?
So I’m tryin’ to organi— There’s all kinds o’ cards out there.
I think there’s a little bit goin’ on with your… microphone.
Uh, yeah, see there’s cards here, there’s cards there. I don’t know where to begin. But I’ve actually got them in a wheelbarrow.
I can just bring them on over to you. I mean, if you were… agreeable.
Wha—? You—? So it’s a full wheelbarrow full o’ cards you’re…?
Yes. That’s correct. That’s correct. And I didn’t know if you’d be agreeable or not…
If, ah, you were, I could bring 'em up— Ah! I can give ya five, ten dollars an hour, ya know. Something like that. [mumbling] If you’d be interested in something like that. [sharp inhale]
Um, wha—what’d you say your name was, again?

I’m Stu. And I wanted to give you five, ten dollars an hour! How does that sound for a bunch of stuff here today? Ah! Help you out with that? If you wanna work that out with…? [inhales] I’ve got Garbage Pail Kid cards, I’ve got playing cards, there’s some miniature greeting cards in there. There’s a buncha different stuff. [exhales] [delay]
Um… So… I’m—I’m just tryin’ to understand what you gotta do with these cards.
Well, if you’re tryin’—tryin’ to shuffle 'em… I’m—I’m— Are you lookin' for organization or are you lookin' for—for shuffling?—
I think you— I think you have the wr— I think you have the wrong number.

Are you still there? Oh, hey, I lost ya for a second. I’m not sure what happened on— [delay]But if I could maybe stop by and show ya what I’m workin’ with—drop this wheelbarrow off. I mean, if— Is that something you might be interested in doing? I can give ya four, five dollars an hour, ya know, something like that. [exhales]
I… I thought it was ten dollars an hour.
Actually, I could do that. Yeah, sure. Five, ten dollars an hour, sure, uh-huh! Not a problem! [sniffs]
Ho—ho—how long are you expecting this to take?
Oh, I can give ya five, ten hours. Um… [delay]
I can… You let me know whatcha need! [chuckles]
I’m, um, um… I’m confused what… qualifications you’re looking for in this job. Um…
Get everything organized. Anything ya need!
Everything ya need is fine with me.

And… however you wanna go about it is fine. And, like, if you wanna talk to your mother, that’s fine. Not an issue. I can give ya some time to make your decision. Ya know, whatever you wanna do. [delay]
''["Man" of Wax Trax Records enters call]
Uh… The United States of America.
Oh, I’m... I think I’m—I’m on the wrong number here. Um…
What’re ya—? Who’re ya callin’ for?
I—I just got reconnected to this number. Uh, someone called me.
Yeah, prob’ly just a misdial, dude.
Are—are you hearin’ the third guy talkin’?—
I did for a second. Is this Longmont Potion Castle, by any chance?
…has been forwarded [breaks up] automatic voice message system.
Uh… yeah, man, I can hear ya. Sounds— It kinda sounds like you’re prank callin’ me, though.—
[redacted] [breaks up] —vailable. At the tone, please record your message.
No, somebody is prank calling. They do this all the time.
When you have finished recording, you may hang up
They—they— they connect three different lines…
…and they just screw around with us. They’ve been doing it for a few years. You just have to [unclear]—
Alright, well, uh, you wanna…? Shall we both call it quits, then? How 'bout that?
Well, I haven’t done anything. I’ve just been sitting here and my phone rang twice. So you just have to—
Alright, well that’s what happened to me, so have a good day.
If you are satisfied with your message, press "1". To listen to your message, press "2".
